releaseNotes.headline: Quota updates recover automatically
releaseNotes.summary: Version 0.2.3 keeps Codex limits current after a reset or temporary app-server disconnect.

highlights.title: No more frozen 100%
highlights.detail: Quota polling now reconnects automatically instead of leaving a reset limit stuck at 100% while sessions continue updating.

highlights.title: Live events resume
highlights.detail: After reconnecting, usAIge subscribes to Codex limit events again and continues its five-second refresh fallback.
